tagline: A combustion economy where burning humans powers civilization — and the only solution is to break the loop.
visualizationReason: Fire Force is a causal loop system: the Great Cataclysm causes the combustion crisis, which causes the attempted prevention, which IS the cause. Only a timeline view captures this self-sealing structure.

headerFlavor.loreQuote: The world burns because it was designed to burn. We're just the matches.
headerFlavor.sysWarning: // [SYS_OP]: COMBUSTION ECONOMY ACTIVE — ADOLLA BURST PROPAGATION IN PROGRESS

hero.microHook: The world burns because it was designed to burn.
hero.thesis: The combustion economy is a causal loop: the crisis, the response, and the cause are the same event. Shinra must break the loop by becomi...

aiInsights.casual: Fire Force runs on human combustion — people spontaneously ignite at 25 and become the fuel for civilization. The system is the crisis.
aiInsights.deep: Fire Force is a causal loop system: the Great Cataclysm caused the combustion economy, and the prevention attempts ARE the cause. Adolla Burst is both the problem and the only solution.
